title: Format
description:
A plugin (and now MOD) that will help you with data pack creation.
It can generate NBT and JSON advancement areas with a world edit-like tool.
body:
# New project link -> [https://modrinth.com/mod/format2.0](https://modrinth.com/mod/format2.0)

# Format tool

With this tool, you can generate an NBT area or JSON advancement area.
Have you ever thought it annoying to sit and count to make NBT select areas, now you can automatically generate them with this tool!

# Commands 

```
- /formattool - This will give you the tool to select the area. (Will only work in creative)
- /format nbt or json - It will give you a formatted NBT selector or JSON. 
For example "[x=0,y=0,z=0,dx=0,dy=0,dz=0]". If you left click the message in the chat you will copy it to your clipboard
```


# Tool
With the tool you can left and right click to get the area. Exactly like world edit
